overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a covered cyberpunk market bazaar with neon signage, transitioning to an industrial exterior with massive storage tanks and a towering yellow skyscraper, then returning through the market to exit onto a bright urban pedestrian street. The environment features futuristic architecture, vendor stalls, and scattered NPCs.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market browsing vendor stalls on both sides

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall counter facing the camera

entered.detail: large purple neon sign with yellow text hanging from the ceiling
dark metal ceiling with exposed beams and fluorescent lighting
wooden counter with various items and overhead lighting
striped counter with green stools in front and menu displays
bright green bar stools lined up at the food counter

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dimly lit covered market with a prominent 'BIG SUMMER SALES 2050' sign overhead. Various food stalls line both sides with vendors and green stools visible, while scattered pedestrians move through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial exterior with large storage tanks

events.description: exits the covered market into a bright industrial exterior with massive rusted tanks
bright sunlight illuminates the scene as the camera moves toward the open area

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial tanks toward the bright exit into the open area

entered.detail: massive cylindrical rusted metal storage tanks with pipes
clear blue sky visible through the industrial structures
green neon sign with 'OPEN' text hanging near a canopy
tall futuristic building with yellow and black striped facade

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered market into a bright industrial area dominated by massive rusted storage tanks. The scene opens up to reveal a clear blue sky and a towering yellow and black skyscraper in the distance, with a green neon 'OPEN' sign visible near a canopy structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alley with massive skyscraper view

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the towering yellow and black skyscraper
turns back toward the covered market entrance

agents.ego_description: looking up at the massive skyscraper and surrounding industrial structures before turning back

entered.detail: multiple electrical wires stretching between industrial structures
tall metal lattice tower with antennas

segments.scene_description: The player looks up at the massive yellow and black skyscraper towering against the bright sky, with power lines and a communication tower visible. The camera then turns back toward the market entrance, with the industrial tanks now appearing closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market corridor with vendor stalls

events.description: re-enters the covered market area from the industrial exterior
approaching the bright exit at the end of the covered corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market corridor toward the street exit

notable_agents.action: vendor in blue shirt standing near a pink vending machine

entered.detail: large purple neon sign with yellow text visible again in the corridor
dark enclosed walkway with overhead fluorescent lighting
bright pink automated vending machine with glowing interface
large open metal roll-up door leading to bright exterior

segments.scene_description: The player re-enters the covered market through a different entrance, walking past a vendor near a pink vending machine. The corridor is dimly lit with fluorescent lights, leading toward a bright garage door exit that opens to the outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban pedestrian street with futuristic infrastructure

events.description: exits the covered market through the garage door into bright urban street
turns right along the sidewalk passing under an orange pedestrian bridge

agents.ego_description: walking along the urban sidewalk exploring the futuristic street environment

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark coat walking along the white railing

entered.detail: wide paved pedestrian walkway with red accent lines
large white concrete building with multiple windows and industrial pipes
elevated orange metal walkway crossing over the street
yellow and white safety railing along the sidewalk edge
tall industrial smokestack rising behind the buildings

segments.scene_description: The player exits onto a bright urban sidewalk with a white industrial building on the left and an orange pedestrian bridge ahead. The camera turns right along the path, passing pedestrians and revealing the yellow skyscraper again in the distance, with a tall chimney visible against the clear sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that moves from a dimly lit cyberpunk bazaar into a bright industrial zone before returning through the market to a sunlit urban street. It begins by navigating a covered corridor beneath a prominent Big Summer Sales 2050 sign, passing food stalls and pedestrians in the low light. As the player emerges from the market, the scene opens into a vast industrial area dominated by rusted storage tanks and a towering yellow and black skyscraper set against a clear blue sky. The camera looks up at the massive structure and communication towers before turning back to re-enter the market, passing a pink vending machine and fluorescent lights that lead toward a bright garage door. Finally, the movement exits onto a bright sidewalk with a white industrial building and an orange pedestrian bridge, turning right to reveal the distant yellow skyscraper and a tall chimney under the open sky.
